content.query:
-----------------------
--create view customer
------------------------
CREATE VIEW gold.customer
AS
SELECT *FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://rahulstoragels.blob.core.windows.net/silver/Customer/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as QUERY1
-----------------------
--create view customerss
------------------------
CREATE VIEW gold.customerss
AS
SELECT *FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://rahulstoragels.blob.core.windows.net/silver/Customerss/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as QUERY1
-----------------------
--create view product
------------------------
